extract: Avalugg (Japanese: クレベース Crebase) is an Ice-type Pokémon introduced in Generation VI. It evolves from Bergmite starting at level 37. In Hisui, Avalugg has a dual-type Ice/Rock regional form. It evolves from Bergmite starting at level 37. All Bergmite in Hisui will evolve into this form regardless of their origin.
